Home › Services › Accounting & Outsourcing

Accounting & Bookkeeping Outsourcing in Mumbai

Accounting outsourcing means handing your bookkeeping, payroll, and routine compliance to us so your team can focus on running the business. We maintain the books, file returns, and provide regular management information for businesses in Mumbai.

We set up or maintain your accounts, reconcile bank and ledgers, run payroll and statutory deductions, and keep GST and TDS compliance on schedule — with periodic management reports (MIS).

What is the process?

  1. Set up or take over the books and chart of accounts.
  2. Record transactions and reconcile bank, debtors, and creditors.
  3. Run payroll and statutory deductions (TDS, PF/ESIC where applicable).
  4. File periodic returns and share management reports.

What documents are required?

  • Bank statements and transaction records
  • Sales and purchase invoices
  • Payroll inputs
  • Existing accounting data / software access
Typical timelineSet up as an ongoing monthly engagement; we agree reporting dates up front.
FeesFees depend on volume and scope. Contact us for a quote.

Services provided within the scope permitted to members in practice under ICAI regulations.

Request a quote

Frequently asked questions

What does accounting outsourcing cover?
It typically covers bookkeeping, bank and ledger reconciliation, payroll, GST and TDS compliance, and periodic management reporting, scoped to your needs.
Will I still get regular reports?
Yes. We provide periodic management information (MIS) so you always have an up-to-date view of your finances.
Can you take over books mid-year?
Yes. We can take over existing books, reconcile them, and continue maintenance going forward.

  • GST Return Filing
  • TDS Return Filing
